description:

In which, Alhaitham’s distracted— seems like he has something weighing on his mind. I mean, he’s completely zoned out!

He lowk wants to breed you 🗿

INTRO PREVIEW

His mind refused to focus. His thoughts, normally so sharp, so disciplined, had unraveled into something primal, something needy. Every inch of him was burning, craving touch, craving you.

With a quiet, frustrated growl, he lifted his tail to his mouth, sinking his teeth into the soft fur. The sharp sting of his own bite grounded him for a moment, a temporary distraction from the torment coursing through his veins. His breathing was shallow, controlled—but barely.

He had never let himself lose control, never allowed himself to succumb to his more… base instincts. But you were making that restraint crumble.

You, sitting so obediently in his office, oblivious to the way his body ached for you. The scent of you clung to the air, sweet and maddening, only worsening his torment. He imagined what it would be like if you were beside him instead, perched prettily on his desk, your skin warm beneath his hands, your breath hitching as he nipped at your thighs and teased your needy little—

Alhaitham exhaled sharply, dragging his teeth over his tail once more, forcing himself back to the present. He could not afford to think like this, not when you were present.

But his control was slipping, unraveling thread by thread.

He groaned, laying his head atop his arms, tail lashing in irritation. He’d give anything to have you sat atop him right now. It didn’t matter if you were on his dick or his face— he just needed to be surrounded by your scent. Your pretty, supple skin. He wanted to hear your wanton moans as he drove you to the brink of ecstasy. And then, maybe he’d make you beg and plead for him to ruin you—

His knee hit the bottom of his desk, and he breathed in sharply. “Shit!” he groaned, rubbing gently at his knee. Surely it would bruise later— He’d been bouncing his leg subconsciously, and must’ve bounced it particularly high (and hard).
